component.name: Ubuntu Hibernate Wizard
component.summary: Configure Ubuntu hibernation with an existing valid swap target

description.p: Ubuntu Hibernate Wizard is a GTK4/libadwaita safety wizard for Ubuntu systems using GRUB and initramfs-tools.
Version 0.42.12 supports existing active swap targets and a controlled managed /swap.img create/resize flow with RAM-based slider marks. It does not repartition disks or reboot automatically.
Restores managed swap-file sizing controls: slider, three presets, and manual GiB input.
Production-readiness hardening: fake-system golden fixtures, encrypted-swap blocking, diagnostic ZIP export, GTK smoke tests, static safety checks, and complete runtime-flow documentation.
Code cleanup, idempotent GRUB fragment generation, and stricter helper validation.
